overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a time-lapse transition from golden hour to night at a mountain riverside campsite. The scene opens with sunlit canyon views before shifting to a character playing guitar by a campfire as darkness falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit rocky river canyon with steep cliffs

agents.ego_description: camera slowly pans across the sunlit canyon, capturing the flowing river and rock formations bathed in golden light

entered.detail: bright golden sun rays streaming from behind the cliff edge creating lens flare
flowing river with sparkling sun reflections on the surface
tall vertical stone cliff face with layered rock formations
evergreen trees scattered on the hillside
large rocks in the riverbed and along the shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a serene river canyon bathed in golden hour sunlight. The camera slowly pans across the landscape, revealing sun rays streaming over the cliff edge, a gently flowing river, and scattered pine trees along the rocky banks. No characters are present as the scene establishes the natural wilderness setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: nighttime riverside campsite with active bonfire

events.description: abrupt transition from bright daylight to dark night, revealing the campfire and character
campfire becomes the primary illumination source, casting orange flickering light on surroundings

agents.ego_description: cowboy character sits by the campfire playing an acoustic guitar while the camera slowly orbits around the campsite

notable_agents.action: character wearing cowboy hat sits on rock playing guitar by the fire, occasionally shifting posture

entered.detail: large bonfire with active flames and glowing embers on a metal cooking grate
metal grill suspended over the fire with flames licking upward
dark mountain silhouette visible against the twilight sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to night, revealing a cowboy character playing guitar beside a crackling campfire. The camera slowly orbits the fire, showing the character silhouetted against the flames while the river flows darkly in the background. The firelight illuminates the immediate area, casting dancing shadows on the rocks as the character continues to play.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene river canyon that transforms from a sun-drenched wilderness into a secluded nighttime campsite. It begins with a slow pan across the landscape, capturing golden hour sunlight streaming over cliff edges and illuminating a gently flowing river and scattered pine trees. As the light fades and the environment shifts into deep night, the scene opens up to reveal a cowboy playing guitar beside a crackling campfire. The camera then orbits the fire, transitioning from the broad vistas of the canyon to an intimate view of the character silhouetted against the flames. Finally, the firelight casts dancing shadows across the rocky banks while the river flows darkly in the background.
